creator: novel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Recently I've renamed almost all (I hope) OpenStack related clients from py-fooclient to py-python-fooclient to match their name on pypi, like it's usually done for the Python ports: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=428767

database/py-swiftclient looks like the only one left. Do you mind renaming it?

I'm not including the patch since it looks like more hassle applying it and moving rather than just moving. If it still feels more convenient, I can include patch or make the rename myself given I get an approval.
